title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 6 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 6 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 6 2026
summary:
Main
Today, DCE iron ore futures trended strong but pulled back slightly in the afternoon.Contract 12609 closed at 738 yuan/mt, up 0.14% from the previous trading day. Port spot prices rose 2-3 yuan/mt from the previous day. Traders were active in quoting, steel mills purchased as needed, inquiry interest was moderate, with spot transaction volumes remaining low
Looking ahead, as the downstream enters the off-season and the pace of mine shipments slows, the supply side of iron ore is expected to tighten slightly, though the overall loose pattern will be hard to change.
